name: SL Green Realty Corp.
description: SL Green Realty Corp. is a fully integrated real estate investment trust (REIT) and New York City's largest commercial landlord. The company focuses primarily on acquiring, managing, and maximizing the value of Manhattan commercial properties. As a major player in the real estate market, SL Green maintains a significant portfolio of office buildings and retail spaces, playing a pivotal role in the development and operation of prime commercial real estate in the heart of New York City. The firm is publicly traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SLG.
